description: Describes a software set for Amazon WorkSpaces Thin Client.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the software set.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the software set.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:[\w+=\/,.@-]+:[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+:[a-zA-Z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{0,12}:[a-zA-Z0-9\-\/\._]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Id.description: The ID of the software set.
Id.markdownDescription:
The ID of the software set.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[0-9]{1,9}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Version.description: The version of the software set.
Version.markdownDescription:
The version of the software set.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ReleasedAt.description: The timestamp of when the software set was released.
ReleasedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp of when the software set was released.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ValidationStatus.description: An option to define if the software set has been validated.
ValidationStatus.markdownDescription:
An option to define if the software set has been validated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: VALIDATED | NOT_VALIDATED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Software.description: A list of the software components in the software set.
Software.markdownDescription:
A list of the software components in the software set.
